query:
SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.orderStatus, o.totalAmount, o.createdAt, u.name, u.stampCount, u.lifetimeStamps 
FROM orders o 
JOIN users u ON o.userId = u.id 
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Mujammil%' 
ORDER BY o.id DESC 
LIMIT 5;
